Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current product pages, promotions, and brake part details to supply fresh content context for email generation.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Emails stay accurate and timely with real product data, reducing manual content gathering and avoiding outdated offers.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Generates a complete daily marketing email — subject line, body copy, and CTA — tailored to R1 Concepts brake parts using the scraped product context.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Produces on-brand, conversion-focused email content every day without a copywriter, scaling content output at near-zero marginal cost.

Email Marketing Agent.action: Publishes and sends the AI-generated email to the configured R1 Concepts contact lists via the HubSpot Marketing Email API.
Email Marketing Agent.impact: Delivers targeted daily emails to segmented audiences automatically, maintaining consistent customer touchpoints without manual sends.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Scrapes current DFC product lines, friction materials, and brand messaging to inform AI email generation.
DFC Email Marketing Agent.impact: Ensures every email reflects live DFC inventory and positioning, eliminating the need for manual content briefs.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Writes a full daily marketing email for Dynamic Friction Company, including subject line, body, and CTA based on scraped site content.

DFC Email Marketing Agent.action: Sends the generated DFC email to the appropriate HubSpot contact lists via the Marketing Email API.

R1 Support Agent.action: Pulls newly created or updated support tickets from HubSpot, including customer message, contact details, and ticket metadata.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Centralizes all incoming support requests for AI processing, ensuring no ticket is missed and response time is dramatically reduced.

R1 Support Agent.action: Classifies each ticket by issue type and drafts a context-aware reply for the R1 Concepts support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Cuts ticket triage and response drafting time significantly, allowing support agents to focus on complex escalations rather than routine replies.

R1 Support Agent.action: Writes the AI-generated classification and draft reply back to the HubSpot ticket for the support team to review and send.
R1 Support Agent.impact: Keeps all ticket activity inside HubSpot, giving agents a single workspace with AI-prepared responses ready for one-click approval.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Pulls all form submissions from the Amazon in-box flyer return and issue form stored in HubSpot.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Aggregates scattered customer issue reports into a single structured pull, eliminating manual export and data hunting.

Customer Issues Analyzer.action: Syncs the retrieved HubSpot form submissions into a structured Google Sheet for team review and trend analysis.
Customer Issues Analyzer.impact: Gives the team a live, filterable view of customer issues, enabling faster identification of product defects or fulfillment patterns.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Monitors HubSpot for DFC contacts showing activity signals on the R1 website, such as page visits or form submissions.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Surfaces high-intent customer behavior in real time, giving sales reps the opportunity to reach out at the moment of peak interest.

DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.action: Sends an instant alert to the DFC sales team via Microsoft Teams message and email with the customer activity summary.
DFC Sales Active Customer Alerts.impact: Eliminates manual CRM monitoring and ensures reps are notified within minutes of a customer showing purchase intent.

R1 Customer Agent.action: Customer-facing AI agent for R1 Concepts is currently in development with connections and functionality to be determined.
R1 Customer Agent.impact: Expected to automate customer interactions and self-service support for R1 Concepts customers at scale.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Scrapes local business directories and web sources to identify businesses in the Cerritos area that may need warehouse or office space, then discovers their contact emails.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Generates a fresh list of warm, relevant leads daily without any manual prospecting, dramatically accelerating the outreach pipeline for the sublet.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Writes a personalized warm introduction email for each discovered lead, referencing their business type and the 13140 Midway Place Cerritos sublet opportunity.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Delivers hyper-personalized outreach at scale without a sales copywriter, increasing reply rates compared to generic blast emails.

Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.action: Logs each discovered lead as a new contact in HubSpot and records the outreach email sent for pipeline tracking.
Cerritos Building Sublet Agent.impact: Keeps all sublet leads organized and trackable in one place, enabling follow-up sequencing and conversion monitoring.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Pulls campaign performance data across R1 and DFC Amazon ad accounts, including spend, impressions, clicks, and ACOS metrics.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Consolidates multi-brand ad data into one automated feed, eliminating manual reporting downloads and enabling faster optimization cycles.

R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.action: Analyzes campaign performance data and generates optimization recommendations including bid adjustments, budget reallocations, and keyword insights.
R1 DFC Amazon Ads AI.impact: Delivers expert-level ad analysis continuously, surfacing opportunities that would take a media buyer hours to identify manually.

Creator Discovery Tool.platform: YouTube API + Instagram Looter API + DuckDuckGo API
Creator Discovery Tool.action: Searches YouTube, Instagram, and the web using provided keywords to surface relevant content creators across platforms.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Replaces hours of manual creator browsing with an automated multi-platform sweep, expanding discovery reach and speed.

Creator Discovery Tool.action: Analyzes each discovered creator's profile, content themes, and audience signals to assess relevance and fit for the campaign.
Creator Discovery Tool.impact: Filters raw discovery results into a qualified, ranked list, saving teams from manually reviewing hundreds of irrelevant profiles.

Creator Qualifier.action: Scores each discovered creator against customizable weighting criteria such as engagement rate, niche alignment, audience size, and content quality.
Creator Qualifier.impact: Produces a ranked, objective shortlist of best-fit creators instantly, enabling teams to make faster and more confident partnership decisions.

Creator Outreach.action: Retrieves the learned outreach sequences, prompt templates, and qualified creator lists stored in Drive.
Creator Outreach.impact: Ensures every outreach message is built from validated templates and up-to-date creator data, eliminating manual file hunting.

Creator Outreach.action: Generates personalized outreach messages for each creator by applying learned sequences and prompt logic to their profile data.
Creator Outreach.impact: Produces tailored, on-brand outreach at scale in seconds, replacing hours of manual copywriting per creator.

Creator Outreach.action: Sends the AI-generated outreach emails directly to each qualified creator from the configured sender account.
Creator Outreach.impact: Delivers personalized outreach to dozens of creators simultaneously without any manual sending, accelerating campaign launch timelines.

Creator Reponse.action: Pulls historical influencer email threads and negotiation records to inform the AI's conversational context.
Creator Reponse.impact: Grounds every response in real past conversations, ensuring negotiation tone and terms stay consistent with established relationships.

Creator Reponse.action: Analyzes incoming creator replies and generates contextually appropriate negotiation or follow-up responses using learned conversation patterns.
Creator Reponse.impact: Handles creator back-and-forth intelligently and instantly, reducing response lag from days to minutes and maintaining negotiation momentum.

Creator Reponse.action: Sends or stages the AI-drafted negotiation response back to the creator from the sender account.
Creator Reponse.impact: Keeps creator conversations moving without requiring a human to manually draft each reply, freeing partnership managers for high-value decisions.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Matches MHM vehicle part numbers against the New Availability Guide to identify eligible inventory and generate the weekly load sheet data.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Eliminates manual cross-referencing of vehicle data, producing an accurate load sheet in moments instead of hours of spreadsheet work.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Automates the full email build process in HubSpot, ensuring the correct assets are attached and the campaign is ready to send without manual assembly.

Must Have Monday Email Automation.action: Posts a notification to the relevant Teams channel confirming the MHM email draft has been created and is ready for review.
Must Have Monday Email Automation.impact: Instantly alerts the team when the email is staged, replacing manual check-ins and ensuring no send window is missed.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Generates compelling First to Market email copy and monthly recap content based on new product launch data and campaign guidelines.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Produces publication-ready email drafts instantly, cutting copywriting time from hours to seconds for every new product launch.

First to Market Email Automation.action: Creates the email draft in HubSpot with AI-generated copy, attaches the relevant sales sheet, and stages it for review or sending.
First to Market Email Automation.impact: Delivers a fully built, on-brand HubSpot email ready to deploy for every launch without any manual template work or asset hunting.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Pulls lifecycle reporting metrics including contact growth, deal stages, and email performance for the reporting period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Eliminates manual HubSpot data exports, ensuring the deck reflects live CRM metrics without copy-paste errors.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Retrieves SMS campaign performance metrics including send volume, click rates, and revenue attribution for the month.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Fetches web traffic, session, and conversion data alongside Google Search Console keyword and impression metrics for the period.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Consolidates digital performance data from two sources automatically, replacing a multi-tab manual export process.

Marketing Deck Automation.action: Writes all collected metrics directly into slides 48–55 of the Marketing Highlights deck, populating charts, tables, and data labels.
Marketing Deck Automation.impact: Delivers a fully updated deck section in minutes instead of a half-day of manual slide editing, ready for stakeholder review.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Identifies keyword gaps where R1 Concepts underperforms versus competitors by analyzing impression and ranking data.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Pinpoints exactly which search opportunities to target, ensuring every blog post addresses real traffic gaps rather than guessed topics.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Produces fully written, SEO-optimized blog articles targeting the identified keyword gaps with structured headers, meta content, and product relevance.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Generates publish-ready SEO content at scale, compressing weeks of editorial work into an automated production pipeline.

R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.action: Publishes the AI-written article to the R1 Concepts WordPress site with Yoast SEO fields populated including focus keyword, meta description, and readability settings.
R1 Concepts SEO Blog System.impact: Deploys optimized content live without any manual CMS work, ensuring Yoast best practices are applied consistently on every post.

Shirly PO Workflow Automation.action: Exports open vendor purchase order data including PO numbers, due dates, outstanding quantities, and vendor contact details.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Accepts MHM vehicle part number inputs and matches them against the embedded New Availability Guide logic entirely within the browser.
DFC Load Sheet Generator.impact: Enables anyone on the team to generate accurate load sheets instantly without server access, APIs, or technical setup.

DFC Load Sheet Generator.action: Formats the matched data into a structured DFC load sheet and exports it as a downloadable Excel file directly from the browser.

MHM Attentive SMS Automation.action: Uses Chrome browser automation to log into Attentive, locate the most recent MHM SMS campaign, and clone it as the new week's campaign.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Exports DFC sales transaction data including customer purchase history, order frequency, product mix, and revenue by account.

DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.action: Sends targeted SMS campaigns to high-priority DFC customer segments identified in the sales analysis, including reorder nudges and promotional messages.
DFC Sales Analysis & Email Automation.impact: Reaches customers on a high-engagement channel with timely, data-driven messages, increasing reorder rates and recovering lapsed accounts faster than email alone.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Monitors a designated Teams channel for a new Excel file uploaded by William Nguyen each week.
Super Session Saturday Automation.impact: Eliminates manual file-checking and ensures the automation triggers instantly when new session data is ready, saving 15–30 minutes of coordination time.

Super Session Saturday Automation.action: Uploads the new Excel file to HubSpot File Manager and generates a fresh public download URL.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Generates optimized B2B SEO blog content targeting DFC's core audiences — shops, distributors, and fleets — based on keyword and topic inputs.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Produces publish-ready, search-optimized articles at scale without requiring copywriter hours, accelerating DFC's organic content output.

DFC SEO Blog System.action: Receives the generated blog post and publishes or stages it with proper formatting, categories, and SEO metadata applied.
DFC SEO Blog System.impact: Gets DFC content live on the site faster with consistent formatting and SEO structure, compounding organic search visibility over time.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Scrapes YouTube for existing Friction Friday-style video formats, pulls vehicle images from Bing Images and Wikimedia Commons, and retrieves technical vehicle specs from Wikipedia for the given year/make/model.

Friction Friday Automation.impact: Produces a broadcast-ready, on-brand script in seconds, removing the need for a writer and ensuring consistent episode structure across every vehicle.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Converts the Claude-generated script into a natural-sounding voiceover audio file using a consistent AI voice profile.

Friction Friday Automation.action: Receives the completed script, voiceover file reference, thumbnail asset, and assembled video package via Apps Script webhook and logs the full output for review and upload.

DFC HubSpot Data Setup.impact: Creates a reliable source-of-truth customer dataset that connects ERP transaction history to CRM marketing profiles.

Bomb File Project.action: Project is currently in the planning stage with connections and workflow steps not yet defined.

DFC Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves session data, engagement metrics, and conversion events attributed to DFC blog traffic.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Retrieves monthly blog traffic, session quality metrics, and any conversion events tied to R1 blog content.

R1 Blog Agent Reporting.action: Extracts post publishing history, categories, and content metadata to measure the agent's monthly output and consistency.

PO Invoice Stamp & Sign Automation.action: Monitors the inbox for incoming vendor PO invoice PDFs and extracts the attached files for processing.

DFC Site Visit Automated Emails.action: Tracks which DFC prospect pages are being visited and feeds behavioral signal data into the workflow trigger logic.

R1 AI Ticketing Automation.action: Captures incoming customer support tickets from all channels and queues them for AI classification.

DFC New Arrival Guide (NAG).action: Receives the monthly new arrivals file from Gerrit Young and triggers the upload process to the DFC backend.

Weekly Checkup Bot.action: Pulls the current week's performance data from all three paid channels including spend, impressions, clicks, and conversions.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Extracts the full month's performance data across all paid channels including all key metrics needed for end-of-month reporting.

Monthly Report Builder.action: Formats and narrates the monthly data into a structured report layout designed to slot directly into the end-of-month slide deck.

Asana Agent.action: Monitors tasks, project statuses, and deadlines across active Asana projects and surfaces items that need attention or follow-up.

Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.action: Emails the completed Excel catalog file directly to Mark with the vehicle spec in the subject line and a brief summary of coverage in the body.
Special Markets Catalog Maker (Mark Proj.impact: Delivers the finished catalog to Mark's inbox automatically, completing the entire request without any manual steps after form submission.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Queries live inventory records for every part on the weekly backorder report, pulling current on-hand quantity, on-order status, and in-transit details for each line item.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Replaces a dozen people doing independent manual lookups with a single automated pull, returning complete inventory status for every backordered part in one pass.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Merges the live Dream inventory data into the existing backorder report, enriching each line with current status and flagging any parts with no available source or path to fulfillment.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Transforms a static list of backordered parts into a live, actionable report that immediately shows which orders can be resolved and which are dead ends.

Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).action: Generates and sends draft customer communication emails for flagged backorder items, pre-written with the relevant order details and current status for each affected customer.
Order Status Tracker (Mark Project 2).impact: Dramatically reduces the communication burden on the team by delivering ready-to-send customer updates automatically, ensuring no affected customer is overlooked.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Scrapes the online catalogs of Gyro Disc, Alcon, and Brembo to extract all available two-piece rotor listings including make, model, year fitment, and part specifications.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Captures comprehensive competitor and supplier catalog data automatically, a task that would take days of manual research across three separate websites.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Cross-references the scraped fitment data against DFC's existing parts catalog and compiles the combined results into a formatted reference sheet showing matches and gaps for Dino.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Produces a single, clean reference document that shows exactly where DFC has coverage and where market opportunity exists, without any manual comparison work.

Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.action: Sends automated outreach emails to targeted customers to gather demand data on two-piece rotor fitments, asking about their application needs and purchase intent.
Two Piece Rotor Catalog Builder.impact: Collects real demand signals from the market automatically, giving Dino data-backed insight into which fitments to prioritize without manual outreach effort.

Meta Investigation.action: Pulls the full active ad library across all Meta campaigns and ad sets, extracting the complete ad copy text from every active creative including headlines, primary text, and descriptions.
Meta Investigation.impact: Instantly retrieves all live ad copy across every campaign in one pull, eliminating the need to manually open and read individual ads in Ads Manager.

Meta Investigation.action: Scans all collected ad copy for the specified phrases or terms, identifies every exact match, and records the ad ID, field name, and full copy snippet where each match appears.
Meta Investigation.impact: Finds every instance of a flagged phrase across the entire ad account in seconds, a scan that would take hours to do manually across dozens or hundreds of active ads.

Meta Investigation.action: Sends a formatted report email listing every flagged ad with the exact field, the matched phrase highlighted in context, and the campaign it belongs to.
Meta Investigation.impact: Delivers a complete, audit-ready findings report directly to the right person with no additional work required, enabling fast compliance or creative decisions.

summary: The AI automation pipeline is in strong shape, with 27 of 55 total agents completed, 11 currently in progress, and 17 more planned for future development. No new agents were added to the pipeline this week, and no agents changed stages — the team is heads-down executing on what's already in motion. With nearly half the pipeline fully live and running, the foundation we've built continues to drive real daily, weekly, and monthly impact across email, paid media, SEO, sales, and support. Great work by everyone keeping this momentum going — more updates to come as in-progress builds near the finish line!
